12. Scientist who gave the final shape to cell
theory?
Pg-126, easy
A) Schleiden
B) Schwann
C) Virchow
D) Schleiden & Schwann
13. Which of the following is related to cell
theory :-
Pg-126, medium
i) All living organisms are composed of
cells and product of cells.
ii) Proposed by Schleiden and Schwann.
iii) Modified by Rudolf Virchow
iv) All cells arise from pre — existing cell.
v) “Omnis cellula — e — cellula”
A) Only one of the above
B) Only two of the above
C) Only four of the above
D) All five
Paragraph — 8.3
An Overview of Cell
14. What is the delimiting boundary around a
human cheek cell?
Pg-126, easy
A) Cell membrane B) Protoplasm
C) Protoplast D) Cell wall
15. What is the Semi — fluid matrix inside the
cell?
Pg-126, easy
A) Cell membrane B) Protoplast
C) Cytoplasm D) Nucleus
16. How many of the following statements are
not true:-
Pg-126, medium
i) All cells have membrane bound nuclei
and nucleolus.
ii) Nucleus contains the chromosome
iii) DNA is the Genetic material.
iv) Cytoplasm is the main arena of cellular
activities in plant and animal cells.
A) Only (ii), (iii), & (iv)
B) Only (ii) & (iv)
C) Only (i) & (iii)
D) Only (i)
